_meta.note: Per-catalog compact summary so AI consumers can discover available data without loading every _meta block. Purpose strings are curated in scripts/builders/catalog-summaries.js.

atlas-ttps.json.purpose: MITRE ATLAS TTPs (AML.T0xxx) cited by skills, with tactic, name, description. Pinned to ATLAS v5.1.0 (November 2025).

freshness_policy.note: Per-entry last_verified governs decay. Skills depending on this catalog must check entry freshness before high-stakes use.

cve-catalog.json.purpose: Per-CVE record (CVSS, EPSS, CISA KEV, RWEP, AI-discovery, vendor advisories, framework gaps, ATLAS/ATT&CK mappings). Cross-validated against NVD + CISA KEV + FIRST EPSS via validate-cves.

freshness_policy.note: Per-entry last_verified governs decay. Skills depending on this catalog must check entry freshness before high-stakes use.

cwe-catalog.json.purpose: MITRE CWE entries used by the project (subset with skill citations), with severity hint and category. Pinned to a CWE catalog version.

freshness_policy.note: Per-entry last_verified governs decay. Skills depending on this catalog must check entry freshness before high-stakes use.

d3fend-catalog.json.purpose: MITRE D3FEND countermeasures (D3-xxx) keyed by id, with tactic + name. Pinned to D3FEND v1.0.0 release.

freshness_policy.note: Per-entry last_verified governs decay. Skills depending on this catalog must check entry freshness before high-stakes use.

dlp-controls.json.purpose: DLP control inventory: per-pattern definitions for the dlp-gap-analysis skill, jurisdiction-tagged so a deployment can scope by applicable laws.

freshness_policy.note: Per-entry last_verified governs decay. Skills depending on this catalog must check entry freshness before high-stakes use.

exploit-availability.json.purpose: Per-CVE exploit availability: PoC public status, weaponization signal, AI-assist status, blast-radius. Project-curated (B2 Admiralty confidence) with source citations.

freshness_policy.note: Per-entry last_verified governs decay. Skills depending on this catalog must check entry freshness before high-stakes use.

framework-control-gaps.json.purpose: Per-control framework gap declarations: SI-2, A.8.8, PCI 6.3.3, etc. Each entry names the control, the lag, the evidence CVE, and remediation guidance.

freshness_policy.note: Per-entry last_verified governs decay. Skills depending on this catalog must check entry freshness before high-stakes use.

global-frameworks.json.purpose: Multi-jurisdiction framework registry: 34 jurisdictions × applicable frameworks × patch_sla / notification_sla / critical_controls / framework_gaps. Cross-cutting authority for jurisdiction-clocks index.

freshness_policy.note: Per-entry last_verified governs decay. Skills depending on this catalog must check entry freshness before high-stakes use.

rfc-references.json.purpose: IETF RFCs + active Internet-Drafts cited by skills (TLS, IPsec, PQ crypto migration, HTTP/3, CT). Cross-validated against IETF Datatracker via validate-rfcs.

freshness_policy.note: Per-entry last_verified governs decay. Skills depending on this catalog must check entry freshness before high-stakes use.

zeroday-lessons.json.purpose: Distilled lessons from notable zero-days and campaigns (SesameOp, Copy Fail, Dirty Frag, Copilot RCE, Windsurf MCP). Each entry: technique, distinguishing characteristic, what it means for the framework lag.

freshness_policy.note: Per-entry last_verified governs decay. Skills depending on this catalog must check entry freshness before high-stakes use.
